creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I think this is actually an issue with either Python interpretor 
or distutils, and seems that it was resolved with recent versions, 
i.e. by setting UNAME_r, it's possible to get the correct result 
now. 

Please let me know if you believe this is not the case, thanks 
for your submission!
